title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Old Ones Origins**
*2028*
Become one of the eldritch gods and wage war at the dawn of time.
![Old Ones Origins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_5fd94e34.png)

2. **Forbidden Stars**
*2015*
Assemble your armies, devise your strategy, and wage war across the Herakon Cluster.
![Forbidden Stars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_ebb2d21f.jpg)

3. **-60°**
*2026*
Lead an expedition to the meteorite impact site.
![-60°](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_b8d1b5ce.png)

4. **Rebirth**
*2024*
Rebuild old lands in a lush, hopeful future.
![Rebirth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_23c7a56b.png)

5. **The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers – Ascension**
*2027*
Resist the Ring and forge your fellowship in an epic Middle-earth struggle for power.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers – Ascension](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_37425d0b.png)

6. **Tigris & Euphrates**
*1997*
Keep your Mesopotamian civilization in perfect balance through revolutions and wars.
![Tigris & Euphrates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_5c03b47f.png)

7. **The Game Makers**
*2026*
Follow your dreams and manufacture the greatest board games of all time.
![The Game Makers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_d04f70f3.jpg)

8. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_784c3a26.png)

9. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_fe5193ad.jpg)

10. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_87ea76f5.png)

11. **Wingspan Pocket**
*2026*
Swiftly build and activate a row of colorful birds.
![Wingspan Pocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_e8c6be2d.jpg)

12. **The Resort**
*2027*
Manage a resort in paradise while making your guests happy.
![The Resort](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_1872877e.jpg)

13. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_91d32923.jpg)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_94f36e43.jpg)

15. **Star Trek: Captain's Chair**
*2025*
Step into the shoes of an iconic Star Trek captain and explore the galaxy!
![Star Trek: Captain's Chair](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_f08c9e4e.jpg)

16. **Duel of Meloch**
*2026*
Scythe vs Expeditions: Clash head-to-head on a tight map in a race to victory.
![Duel of Meloch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_87032231.png)

17. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_af516692.jpg)

18. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_1351a24f.jpg)

19. **Wolfmoon**
*2026*
Use the card effects to eliminate all your competition.
![Wolfmoon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_4c4adf9f.jpg)

20. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_65881e29.jpg)

21. **dnup**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_d2bedf83.jpg)

22. **Raindrops**
*2026*
On a rainy day, little droplets trickle down the window...
![Raindrops](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_c35f8447.png)

23. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_cb78b501.jpg)

24. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_6a225b9d.jpg)

25. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_698c66b4.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*18 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_b7547678.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*26 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_52f0b199.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*21 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_2dbc514c.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*54 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_dd1f706f.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*90 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_c89c6b02.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*104 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_1b79b641.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*14 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_e021623b.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*117 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_964166c8.jpg)

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*36 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_01e7a9d6.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*43 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_cd7f99ba.jpg)

11. **Faraway**
*26 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_c65aa43c.png)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*33 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_080ae026.jpg)

13. **Cascadia**
*59 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_30ee3d9e.jpg)

14. **dnup**
*1 months on the list*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_870607bd.jpg)

15. **Sky Team**
*33 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_5878edaa.jpg)

16. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2 months on the list*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_cb39cf24.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*5 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_eb3aeaf5.jpg)

18. **The Gang**
*12 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_318667fe.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*5 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_5fb44622.png)

20. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*66 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_67ead6fa.jpg)

21. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*19 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_47b73f49.jpg)

22. **Wondrous Creatures**
*1 months on the list*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_61316041.jpg)

23. **Carcassonne**
*276 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_515140c9.jpg)

24. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*12 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_e5918ece.jpg)

25. **SCOUT**
*43 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-21/toplist/bgg_0c627337.png)
